mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role_group_management (role_group_name, description, created_at) VALUES (#{roleGroup.roleGroupName}, #{roleGroup.description}, #{roleGroup.createdAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM role_group_management
AND role_group_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.roleGroupName}, '%')
LIMIT CAST(#{params.offset} AS UNSIGNED), CAST(#{params.limit} AS UNSIGNED)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role_group_management (group_name, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{params.group.groupName}, #{params.group.description}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, group_name, description, created_at, updated_at FROM role_group_management ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, group_name, description, created_at, updated_at FROM role_group_management ORDER BY created_at DESC

if.test: (params.group != null and params.group.groupName != null and params.group.groupName != '') or (params.groupName != null and params.groupName != '')
(params.group != null and params.group.description != null and params.group.description != '') or (params.description != null and params.description != '')
